creator: info@rickvanderzwet.nl
text:
Patch is also working fine against RELENG_7_2 with the device Genbird SIS-PM.

The SIS-PMS-LAN is incorrectly quoted as that got nothing to do with
the patch as it has an RJ45 Ethernet connection, instead of a USB
connection.

/Rick
--
